isi.driveFileNames: yourbeagle & Norwegian Wood - On My Own.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric yourbeagle & Norwegian Wood - On My Own

Romanization

I like you better when I don’t need you
When my nights don’t depend on your mood
I’ve been quiet learning my shape
Loving myself in a softer way
You see me shining without a sound
That’s when you wanna come around

I’m good on my own don’t save me now
I know my heart I know how
To hold my ground when feelings grow
I don’t fall fast I fall slow
If you stay it’s because you choose
Not because I’m scared to lose
I’m good on my own but maybe you
Can walk beside me if you want to

I don’t chase words I watch your actions
I’ve had love with too many questions
butjamneun sonen gwansimeopseo
seuseuro seo isseunikka
saeroun haruga tto dasi coming
maeiri dopamin teojini jeulgyeo
hyeonsaengttawineun jeo meolli

I’m good on my own don’t save me now
I know my heart I know how
To hold my ground when feelings grow
I don’t fall fast I fall slow
If you stay it’s because you choose
Not because I’m scared to lose
I’m good on my own but maybe you
Can walk beside me if you want to

I don’t need a promise tonight
Just honesty in the light
If love comes I’ll let it in
But I won’t disappear again

I’m good on my own don’t save me now
I know my heart I know how
To hold my ground when feelings grow
I don’t fall fast I fall slow
If you stay it’s because you choose
Not because I’m scared to lose
I’m good on my own but maybe you
Can walk beside me if you want to
